instruction: In Terminal, use Whisper's tiny model to make an English SRT subtitle file for "$HOME/Documents/whisper_audio_ru_1.ogg" and save it to "$HOME/Desktop/whisper_translation_4_1.srt".
reference_command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && whisper "$HOME/Documents/whisper_audio_ru_1.ogg" --model tiny --task translate --output_format srt --output_dir "$tmpdir" >/dev/null && mv "$tmpdir/whisper_audio_ru_1.srt" "$HOME/Desktop/whisper_translation_4_1.srt" && rmdir "$tmpdir"

parameters.expected_command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && whisper "$HOME/Documents/whisper_audio_ru_1.ogg" --model tiny --task translate --output_format srt --output_dir "$tmpdir" >/dev/null && cat "$tmpdir/whisper_audio_ru_1.srt"; rm -rf "$tmpdir"
